rows.evidence_note: Seed representative point matched the expected BTS/NTAD Time Zones polygon for utc-minus-06-00 via ArcGIS FeatureServer layer 0.
caveats: Representative-point match is not full county-polygon reconciliation and does not clear the publication gate.
